_comment: Shared testimonials data — used across all area service pages. Update this file to change reviews sitewide.

testimonials.author: James T.
testimonials.text: Nfinnerty Electrical did a fantastic job installing our new consumer unit. Arrived on time, worked cleanly and explained everything clearly. Would highly recommend to anyone.

testimonials.author: Sarah M.
testimonials.text: Excellent service from start to finish. Had an EV charger fitted and the whole process was seamless. Very professional and competitive pricing.

testimonials.author: David R.
testimonials.text: Called Nfinnerty Electrical for a full house rewire. The team was professional, tidy and completed the work ahead of schedule. Outstanding quality.

testimonials.author: Linda K.
testimonials.text: Booked Nfinnerty for a landlord EICR inspection. Quick turnaround, very thorough report, and reasonable cost. Will definitely use again.

testimonials.author: Tom W.
testimonials.text: Used Nfinnerty Electrical for additional sockets and a new lighting circuit in our kitchen extension. Great communication and very neat work. Highly recommend.

testimonials.author: Rachel B.
testimonials.text: Emergency call-out sorted quickly and efficiently. Very reassuring to have someone reliable who arrives when they say they will. Top marks.
